benchmarks._note: Code-generation benchmarks require a running LLM inference endpoint. Not measurable until M1 eval harness is wired to a model. Marked NOT_MEASURED (not null) to distinguish from 'forgotten'.
benchmarks.humaneval_pass_at_1: NOT_MEASURED — requires LLM inference endpoint (M1 milestone)
benchmarks.mbpp_pass_at_1: NOT_MEASURED — requires LLM inference endpoint (M1 milestone)
benchmarks.swe_bench_lite_resolve_rate: NOT_MEASURED — requires LLM + code execution sandbox (M1 milestone)
benchmarks.swe_bench_full_resolve_rate: NOT_MEASURED — requires LLM + code execution sandbox (post-M1)
benchmarks.multipl_e_pass_at_1: NOT_MEASURED — requires LLM inference endpoint (M1 milestone)
benchmarks.ds_1000_pass_at_1: NOT_MEASURED — requires LLM inference endpoint (M1 milestone)
benchmarks.golden_corpus_pass_rate: NOT_MEASURED — golden corpus tasks not yet authored (M1 milestone)

performance._note: Measured on Linux x86-64, Node v22. Project: 322 JS files / ~35k LOC. KB: 1,265 docs / 13,461 chunks. Scan re-measured 2026-05-20 after parallel lint fix.
performance.scan_latency_1m_loc_ms: NOT_MEASURED — no 1M-LOC project available; extrapolated ~66s from 35k-LOC/2.4s rate
performance.patch_generation_avg_s: NOT_MEASURED — requires LLM inference endpoint (M1 milestone)
